title: Maintain health and welfare of poultry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain health and welfare of poultry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor poultry environment

pcs.text: Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks.

pcs.text: Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for poultry health checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for poultry health checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) required for poultry health checks.

pcs.text: Check poultry housing and/or enclosures meet animal safety, security, health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check poultry housing and/or enclosures meet animal safety, security, health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check poultry housing and/or enclosures meet animal safety, security, health and welfare requirements according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor, maintain and operate ventilation, temperature and humidity control equipment where installed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor, maintain and operate ventilation, temperature and humidity control equipment where installed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor, maintain and operate ventilation, temperature and humidity control equipment where installed.

pcs.text: Check poultry feeders and drinkers are operational, and maintain feed and water availability according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check poultry feeders and drinkers are operational, and maintain feed and water availability according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check poultry feeders and drinkers are operational, and maintain feed and water availability according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pest, vermin and/or predator controls are in place, and adjust as required.

pcs.text: Resolve and report issues according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Resolve and report issues according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Resolve and report issues according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor poultry environment

elements.title: Carry out routine poultry health checks

pcs.text: Identify signs of good health in poultry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of good health in poultry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of good health in poultry.

pcs.text: Catch and/or handle birds for inspection and/or weighing using safe and low stress techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch and/or handle birds for inspection and/or weighing using safe and low stress techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch and/or handle birds for inspection and/or weighing using safe and low stress techniques.

pcs.text: Check poultry, and recognise and report signs of injuries or ill health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check poultry, and recognise and report signs of injuries or ill health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check poultry, and recognise and report signs of injuries or ill health.

pcs.text: Identify cull birds using criteria established by the enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify cull birds using criteria established by the enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify cull birds using criteria established by the enterprise.

pcs.text: Record and report flock and/or individual bird health status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report flock and/or individual bird health status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report flock and/or individual bird health status.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out routine poultry health checks

elements.title: Administer treatments to poultry

pcs.text: Determine poultry vaccine, medication or other treatment requirements according to poultry health plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine poultry vaccine, medication or other treatment requirements according to poultry health plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine poultry vaccine, medication or other treatment requirements according to poultry health plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate PPE required for treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for treatment.

pcs.text: Select and handle vaccines, medications, chemicals and other treatments safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and handle vaccines, medications, chemicals and other treatments safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and handle vaccines, medications, chemicals and other treatments safely.

pcs.text: Provide routine vaccines, medications or other treatments to poultry, using safe and low stress techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide routine vaccines, medications or other treatments to poultry, using safe and low stress techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide routine vaccines, medications or other treatments to poultry, using safe and low stress techniques.

pcs.text: Store vaccines, medications and treatments according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store vaccines, medications and treatments according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store vaccines, medications and treatments according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Complete records according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records according to enterprise requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Administer treatments to poultry

elements.title: Collect samples for analysis

pcs.text: Take swab samples of work surfaces as directed and according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take swab samples of work surfaces as directed and according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take swab samples of work surfaces as directed and according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Label and pack swabs and samples for dispatch
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label and pack swabs and samples for dispatch?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label and pack swabs and samples for dispatch.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Collect samples for analysis

elements.title: Remove non-viable poultry

pcs.text: Remove sick or injured poultry according to enterprise animal welfare and infection control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove sick or injured poultry according to enterprise animal welfare and infection control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove sick or injured poultry according to enterprise animal welfare and infection control procedures.

pcs.text: Provide treatment to sick poultry as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide treatment to sick poultry as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide treatment to sick poultry as required.

pcs.text: Remove and/or dispose of dead poultry according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and/or dispose of dead poultry according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and/or dispose of dead poultry according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Provide post-mortem assistance as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide post-mortem assistance as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide post-mortem assistance as required.

pcs.text: Record and report poultry losses and non-viable poultry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report poultry losses and non-viable poultry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report poultry losses and non-viable poultry.
